name: PAE Limited
summary: PAE Limited engages in the sale and service of lead storage batteries, power backup systems, and automotive parts in India. The company's batteries include automotive, inverter, tower tubular, flat plate, VRLA, and solar tubular batteries. It markets its batteries under the Zenide, Zenide Gold, Zenide Silver, Zenide Automotive, and Zenide Motorcycle brands. The company was formerly known as Premier Auto Electric and changed its name to PAE Limited in 2003. PAE Limited was founded in 1950 and is based in Mumbai, India.
